## Checklist
- [ ] `cargo test -p neuroforge-core` pasa
- [ ] `npm run lint` pasa
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` pasa
- [ ] `npm run coverage` sin regresiones
- [ ] El motor (`neuroforge-core`) sigue libre de detalles de bindings/runtime
